2606.14502.title: From Chatbot to Digital Colleague: The Paradigm Shift Toward Persistent Autonomous AI
2606.14502.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are undergoing a fundamental transformation from conversational generators into integrated AI systems capable of reasoning, action, memory, and self-improvement. We conceptualize this transition as a shift from Chatbot to Digital Colleague: from conversational answers to persistent work. We organize this transition along two tightly coupled dimensions. First, at the cognitive core level, LLMs are advancing from Chatbot-era "fast thinking" systems driven by next-token prediction toward Thinking LLMs that leverage inference-time computation, Chain-of-Thought reasoning, reflection, process supervision, and reinforcement learning to support more deliberate and reliable cognition. Second, at the tool-augmented task execution level, LLMs are progressing from tool-calling Agents that invoke external resources in an ad hoc manner toward OpenClaw-style workstation systems (OpenClaw) equipped with persistent Workspaces, skills, verification loops, and governance. The "Workspace + Skill" paradigm makes episodic tool use colleague-like via state persistence, reusable procedures, task closure, and experience reuse. We examine data construction shifts from instruction-response pairs to State-Action-Observation trajectories and evaluation from static benchmarks to sandboxed, auditable, self-evolving AI ecosystems.
2606.14502.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）正在從對話生成器根本轉變為能夠推理、行動、記憶和自我改進的綜合人工智慧系統。<lb/>我們將這一過渡概念化為從聊天機器人到數位同事的轉變：從對話回答到持續工作的轉變。<lb/>我們沿著兩個緊密耦合的維度組織這一過渡。<lb/>首先，在認知核心層面，LLMs 正在從聊天機器人時代的「快速思考」系統，這些系統由下一個標記預測驅動，向利用推理時間計算、思考鏈推理、反思、過程監督和強化學習的思考 LLMs 進步，以支持更深思熟慮和可靠的認知。<lb/>其次，在工具增強的任務執行層面，LLMs 正在從隨機調用外部資源的工具調用代理，向配備持久工作區、技能、驗證循環和治理的 OpenClaw 風格工作站系統（OpenClaw）進展。<lb/>「工作區 + 技能」範式使得情境工具使用變得類似同事，透過狀態持久性、可重用的程序、任務完成和經驗重用。<lb/>我們檢視數據構建的變化，從指令-回應對到狀態-行動-觀察軌跡，並將評估從靜態基準轉向沙盒、可審計、自我演化的人工智慧生態系統。
2606.14502.author: Yongheng Zhang et.al.
2606.14502.authors: Yongheng Zhang, Ziang Liu, Jiaxuan Zhu, Shuai Wang, Xiangqi Chen, Haojing Huang, Jiayi Kuang, Siyu Chen, Ao Shen, Hao Wu, Qiufeng Wang, Qian-Wen Zhang, Junnan Dong, Wenhao Jiang, Ying Shen, Hai-Tao Zheng, Yinghui Li, Di Yin, Xing Sun, Philip S. Yu
